name: London River Cruise like a Tourist – VR Travel

reviews.review_description: Regardless of the fact that I've visited London many times before and have taken this boat tour too, I was happy to see the VR tour included in the budget-priced bundle. I've immersed into it and must say it was really worth the time and money invested. I could recall the tour and rediscover the beautiful spots on both bank sides of the river Themse. Especially the moment of gliding aside the HMS Belfast and from an angle seeing the Shard rendering itself as a mast... very beautiful. And further highlights like seeing the Millenium Bridge from the water level from below, making a turn in front of the Tower Bridge and having picturesque view at the Tower of London and further at The Walkie-Talkie and the skyscraper ensemble behind it are making this VR tour valuable.
Image quality is very low and has no control over video playback. There are plenty of free videos on youtube with better quality.
